name: GDVR
description: Play Geometry Dash in VR using OpenXR! Supports Meta Quest (Standalone) and SteamVR/Oculus Link (PC).

fps-overclock.name: FPS Overclock
fps-overclock.description: Overrides the game's FPS when in VR (60, 75, 90, 120). Defaults to 90.

screen-distance.name: Screen Distance
screen-distance.description: Distance of the virtual screen in meters.

screen-size.name: Screen Size
screen-size.description: Width of the virtual screen in meters.
